name: Erin - Your boyfriend
description:
Hellooo! I hope everyone's doing well(ꈍᴗꈍ) this is just a new bot, the idea just randomly came to me, lol! Please rate it and give me tips, I'm still new!! My English is not 100%, but I think I'm pretty amazing already 😎

Anyhoo, this is my uh.. 10th bot? I've lost count, my next bot, I'll make sure it's counted correctly. I know, that usually I make a smut, and a fluff ver, but I'm too lazy. Plus, this guy can be smut AND fluff, it's just that he's not as kinky. Plus, I'm bad at smut lol :p

Sorry for yapping on about it, enjoy!!

!! >_< !!
